untranslatable_reason: Signal requires COT (Commitment of Traders) data with net long positions (NL) by reporting trader groups (small speculators, large speculators, commercials). This external, non-price data source is not available in the allowed indicators list. The stochastic oscillator formula can be applied to price data (stoch_k, stoch_d available), but cannot be applied to COT positioning data. COT Index requires specialized market structure data unavailable in standard OHLCV/technical indicator sets.
translation_notes: KAUFMAN_DRY_14 is a regime identification tool based on COT positioning cycles rather than price action. It plots stochastic oscillators of three trader group positions using 1-year lookback with 1.5-4 year observation windows. Without COT data access, this signal cannot be operationalized in a price-only backtest engine. To implement: (1) integrate COT report data feeds, (2) calculate stochastic on NL series per group, (3) interpret convergence/divergence patterns as regime signals.
